content:
Neptune in Pisces: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Neptune in Pisces blends the archetypal drive of Neptune (where you dream, dissolve boundaries, and seek the transcendent) with the Water, mutable nature of Pisces.

  • Planet: Neptune — dreams, imagination, spirituality, illusion, compassion
  • Sign: Pisces (Water/Mutable) — dreams, compassion, mysticism, surrender, imagination
